strengths.title: Effective Needs Discovery
strengths.evidence: Advisor asked about weight gain causes, eating habits, medical conditions, and exercise routine to understand customer's needs.

strengths.title: Clear Explanation of Product Benefits
strengths.evidence: Advisor explained that the program includes workout, nutrition coaching, and emotional eating management.

strengths.title: Professional and Courteous Closing
strengths.evidence: Advisor offered a free consultation, scheduled it, and confirmed the booking politely.

improvements.title: Clarify Budget Currency
improvements.suggestion: Advisor should confirm the currency or clarify the budget amount to avoid misunderstandings.

improvements.title: More Rapport Building
improvements.suggestion: Advisor could have used more empathetic statements or small talk to build stronger rapport.

summary: The advisor conducted a well-structured call with effective needs discovery and clear product explanation. The call was professional and ended with a successful booking of a free consultation. Minor improvements include clarifying budget details and enhancing rapport building.
